---
title: "Quadrant report"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    theme: cosmo
params:
  bundle_path: ""
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

<!--
Quadrant: spirometry reference value calculator
License: AGPL-3.0-or-later

Template renders a one-page HTML report from a pre-built bundle
serialised as RDS. All HTML fragments are pre-rendered by R/report.R
so this template stays a thin shell with no R dependencies of its
own beyond base R and htmltools (which Quarto already pulls in).
Each chunk returns htmltools::HTML() so Quarto treats the content as
raw HTML, not as markdown that happens to start with a tag.
-->

```{r setup}
bundle <- readRDS(params$bundle_path)
subject <- bundle$subject
family_blocks <- bundle$family_blocks
```

```{r}
htmltools::HTML(sprintf(
  '<p style="color:#475569; font-size: 0.9rem;">Generated %s</p>',
  format(bundle$timestamp, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")
))
```

## Subject

```{r}
htmltools::HTML(sprintf(
  '<table class="table" style="max-width: 520px;"><tr><th>Age</th><td>%s years</td></tr><tr><th>Sex</th><td>%s</td></tr><tr><th>Height</th><td>%s cm</td></tr><tr><th>Ethnicity (GLI-2012)</th><td>%s</td></tr><tr><th>Ethnicity (NHANES III)</th><td>%s</td></tr><tr><th>Observed FEV1</th><td>%.2f L</td></tr><tr><th>Observed FVC</th><td>%.2f L</td></tr></table>',
  subject$age_years, subject$sex_label, subject$height_cm,
  subject$ethnicity_gli_label, subject$ethnicity_nhanes3_label,
  subject$fev1, subject$fvc
))
```

## Cross-family z-score comparison

```{r}
htmltools::HTML(paste0(bundle$chart_svg, bundle$comparison_text_html))
```

## Per-family results

```{r}
family_html <- vapply(names(family_blocks), function(fam_name) {
  block <- family_blocks[[fam_name]]
  sprintf(
    '<div style="border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:8px; padding:14px 18px; margin-bottom:14px;"><h3 style="margin-top:0;">%s</h3><p style="color:#475569; font-size:0.9rem; margin-bottom:8px;">%s</p>%s%s<hr />%s</div>',
    fam_name, block$subtitle, block$badge_html, block$table_html,
    block$interpretation_html
  )
}, character(1))
htmltools::HTML(paste(family_html, collapse = ""))
```

---

```{r}
htmltools::HTML('<p style="color:#475569; font-size:0.9rem;">For research and educational purposes. Not for clinical decision-making.</p>')
```
